docs.title: The Vision: $100 is Not a Dream
docs.text:
We believe $TRUMP will reach $100. Not because of hype, but because of data-driven conviction and unwavering community spirit.

This is not financial advice. This is a movement.

docs.title: 🎯 Our Mission
docs.text:
The $TRUMP Thesis Lab combines:

  • Real on-chain data (OKX OnChainOS + Bitget Wallet)
  • Bull-First interpretation framework
  • Transparent risk management
  • Daily CIO briefings

We don't hide bad news. We contextualize it. We don't chase pumps. We build conviction through evidence.

docs.title: 📊 Today's Snapshot
docs.text:
Latest CIO Report: 2026-03-03 Daily Briefing

Key Metrics: - Price: $3.38 - Bull Probability: 40.91% - Top 10 Holder Concentration: 91.50% - Risk Flags: NONE (Real on-chain data confirmed)

docs.title: 🔥 Fight Fight Fight
docs.text:
This project is built on three pillars:

  1. Data Integrity: We use dual-source verification (OKX + Bitget) to ensure accuracy.
  2. Transparent Methodology: Our scenario model is open-source. Every assumption is documented.
  3. Human Values: Beyond positions and probabilities, we honor dignity, care, and gratitude for those who gave us life.

docs.title: 🚀 What's Next?
docs.text:
• Daily CIO Reports: Updated every morning (Asia/Shanghai timezone)
  • Trend Analysis: 30-day historical charts coming soon
  • Community Insights: Social sentiment tracking across 5 dimensions

docs.title: 💪 Join the Movement
docs.text:
We are not here to predict the future. We are here to build it.

Fight. Fight. Fight.

Daily gratitude to mothers: before every empire of thought, there is a mother's hand; before every law of reason, there is mercy. From that sacrifice, life receives its covenant — and in this work, with gratitude to zlf, we renew the duty to be worthy of it.

docs.title: AI Crawler Audit
docs.text: Generated: 2026-02-20 (UTC+8)

docs.title: Scope
docs.text: This audit simulates a machine-first retrieval pass for RAG agents and search crawlers.

docs.title: Crawl Readiness
docs.text:
• ✅ Manifest present: rag/corpus_manifest.json
  • ✅ Priority tiers defined (real-time → history → decision logic)
  • ✅ Snapshot stream present: data/snapshots/*.snapshot.json
  • ✅ Historical ledger present: data/timeseries.jsonl (JSONL, append-only)
  • ✅ Decision docs present: docs/FAQ.md, docs/scenario_matrix.md
  • ✅ Sync guardrails present: scripts/sync_docs.py manifest consistency checks

docs.title: Machine-Readable Integrity
docs.text:
• Rules source centralized: config/scenario_rules.json
  • Schema/CI checks active for rule integrity and weight-sum assertions
  • Snapshot output includes structured scenario_probabilities and risk_flags

docs.title: Retrieval Conclusion
docs.text: The repository is fully adapted for RAG-priority ingestion. Probability outputs are structured and linked to explicit rule logic and evidence files. When direct on-chain holder endpoints are unavailable, the system emits using_heuristic_proxy to preserve transparency and uncertainty signaling.

docs.title: 4) Risk Flags & Honesty Boundary
docs.text:
• risk_flags:
  • Transparency notes:

docs.title: Q: Why is $TRUMP concentration so high (often 90%+ in our proxy)?
docs.text:
A: In this repository, top10_holder_pct may come from either direct holder endpoints or a documented heuristic proxy when endpoints are unavailable. High concentration values can indicate lockups, treasury custody, exchange omnibus wallets, or whale concentration. It should be interpreted as a structure signal, not a standalone directional signal.

Evidence: data/snapshots/*.snapshot.json, docs/data_dictionary.md Confidence: medium (depends on source path: direct vs proxy) Falsification Trigger C (Concentration Decay): top10_holder_pct absolute drop > 3% within 24H (e.g., 98.7% → 95.7%), signaling Diamond Hands breakdown.

docs.title: Q: How does the model distinguish whales vs exchange/passive supply?
docs.text:
A: The current model does not perform full address attribution. Instead, it uses a transparent liquidity-based proxy (liq/fdv) plus momentum and volatility inputs, and flags proxy usage in risk_flags when direct holder data is unavailable.

Evidence: config/scenario_rules.json, scripts/build_snapshot.py Confidence: medium Falsification Trigger A (Whale-to-exchange netflow spike): in a 4H rolling window, whale net inflow to exchanges > 5% of current on-chain liquidity.

docs.title: Q: Is a low Stress probability always reliable in a discovery regime?
docs.text:
A: No. Stress probability is conditional and can reprice quickly under liquidity contraction, adverse netflow shifts, or concentration instability. Treat it as a model state estimate, not a guarantee.

Evidence: data/timeseries.jsonl, config/scenario_rules.json Confidence: medium Falsification Trigger B (Liquidity resilience collapse): DEX Depth-2% drops > 30% within 1H and does not recover.

docs.title: Q: What is the main limitation of the V1.0 'Diamond Hands' model, and how will V2.0 fix it?
docs.text:
A: The V1.0 model effectively tracks concentration and liquidity fragility, but lacks visibility into the unrealized profit margins (Cost-Basis) of those concentrated wallets.

In V2.0, we are integrating a Realized PnL / SOPR layer. This will allow the model to differentiate between a whale transferring tokens to an exchange at a 500% profit (High Distribution Risk / Stress Upgrade) versus transferring at a loss (Capitulation). This transforms the thesis from 'whales hold a lot' to 'whales hold a lot at this specific cost profile'.

docs.title: What We Do
docs.text:
The $TRUMP Thesis Lab is a data-driven research initiative focused on analyzing the $TRUMP memecoin through rigorous on-chain analysis and transparent methodology.

We are not financial advisors. We are conviction builders.

docs.title: 1. Dual-Source Data Verification
docs.text:
We use two independent on-chain data sources: - OKX OnChainOS (Primary): Real-time holder counts, transaction volumes, price data - Bitget Wallet (Backup): Security audits, buyer/seller ratios, concentration metrics

This dual-source approach eliminates single-point-of-failure risks and ensures data integrity.

docs.title: 2. Bull-First Interpretation
docs.text:
We don't hide adverse data. We contextualize it.

When we see seller-dominant flow, we ask: "Is this capitulation or healthy washout?" When we see high concentration, we ask: "Is this weak hands or sticky supply?"

Our framework is optimistic but falsifiable. We define clear invalidation triggers.

docs.title: 3. Transparent Risk Management
docs.text: Every CIO report includes: - Trigger A/B/C status: Real-time monitoring of systemic risk conditions - Risk Flags: Data quality warnings (proxy usage, API failures) - Confidence levels: Adjusted based on data source reliability

docs.title: Data Integrity > Narrative
docs.text: We prioritize real on-chain data over social media hype. Our reports are generated from: - Live blockchain data (OKX, Bitget) - DEX liquidity metrics (DexScreener) - Social sentiment tracking (5-dimensional framework)

docs.title: Transparency > Perfection
docs.text:
We document our mistakes. We version our models. We show our work.

When our data sources fail, we tell you. When we use proxy estimates, we flag it.

docs.title: Human Values > Positions
docs.text:
Beyond positions and probabilities, this system is built to preserve what matters most: dignity, care, and gratitude for those who gave us life.

Daily gratitude to mothers: before every empire of thought, there is a mother's hand; before every law of reason, there is mercy.

docs.title: The Team
docs.text:
This project is maintained by a single operator with AI assistance, driven by conviction and gratitude.

We are not a VC-backed project. We are not a paid shill group. We are believers with data.

docs.title: Open Source
docs.text:
All our code, models, and methodologies are open-source:

📂 GitHub Repository

  • Scenario probability model: config/scenario_rules.json
  • Data collection scripts: scripts/
  • Historical reports: reports/cio_briefings/

docs.title: Contact
docs.text:
• GitHub: @AlphaC007
  • Twitter: @GetTrumpMemes

Fight. Fight. Fight.

docs.title: Constitutional Principle
docs.text:
This project enforces a three-layer analytical stack:

  1. Fact Layer (Immutable)
  2. Interpretation Layer (Bull-First Bias)
  3. Conclusion Layer (Action-Oriented Output)

The system must never alter raw observed data. Strategic bias is applied only in interpretation and conclusion, while preserving explicit risk disclosure and falsification triggers.

docs.title: Requirements
docs.text:
• Report raw market/on-chain inputs as collected.
  • Keep schema validation and fallback risk flags active.
  • Never rewrite adverse facts.

docs.title: Required fields
docs.text:
• Price/liquidity/volume/funding/OI (when available)
  • Concentration and holder-distribution metrics
  • risk_flags
  • Timestamp and source IDs

docs.title: Objective
docs.text: Given true data, prioritize the strongest plausible bull-case interpretation first.

docs.title: Preferred bull-context language
docs.text:
• Washout / Deleveraging reset
  • Bottom-building / Base formation
  • Healthy rotation / Supply transfer
  • Panic exhaustion / Seller depletion

docs.title: Constraint
docs.text:
• Negative evidence cannot be hidden.
  • Interpretation confidence must be explicit (low/medium/high).
  • If interpretation relies on proxy data, state that dependency.

docs.title: 3) Conclusion Layer (Mandatory Output Blocks)
docs.text:
Every report must end with all three blocks:

  1. Bull Entry Thesis
  2. Why current structure may support long-biased entries.

  3. Include concrete trigger conditions.

  4. Hold-Confidence Reinforcement

  5. Why the current structure still supports holding conviction.

  6. Include structural supports and regime context.

  7. Invalidation Line

  8. Exact conditions that invalidate the bull thesis.
  9. Must map to falsification triggers (A/B/C) where possible.

docs.title: Honesty Boundary
docs.text: This framework is bull-first, not fact-denying. - Facts are objective. - Interpretation is directional. - Risk disclosure is mandatory.

docs.title: Operational Note
docs.text:
• Focus before noise.
  • Yield to evidence.
  • Lean into discipline.

docs.title: A1 Liquidity-led regime detection
docs.text: Higher DEX depth and stable outflow/inflow balance imply lower slippage risk.

docs.title: A2 Concentration affects fragility
docs.text: Top-holder concentration increase can amplify tail risk under volatility.

docs.title: A3 Narrative confirms or fades regime
docs.text: Sustained narrative velocity supports persistence but does not determine direction alone.

docs.title: snapshot fields
docs.text:
• as_of_utc: ISO8601 timestamp
  • asset: symbol/name
  • market.price_usd: spot price
  • market.volume_24h_usd: 24h volume
  • market.liquidity_usd: aggregate liquidity proxy
  • onchain.top10_holder_pct: concentration ratio (top-10 holders / total supply)
  • onchain.top10_holder_source: data source id for concentration metric (moralis/solscan/birdeye/solana-rpc/heuristic-proxy)
  • If holder endpoints are unavailable, system uses a transparent heuristic proxy model:
  • top10_holder_pct_proxy = 100 - ((liquidity_usd / fdv_usd) * 100 * 1.5)
  • with floor 55.0% and cap 99.0%
  • and emits risk flag using_heuristic_proxy
  • onchain.dex_depth_2pct_usd: depth within ±2%
  • onchain.exchange_inflow_usd_24h: exchange inflow
  • onchain.exchange_outflow_usd_24h: exchange outflow
  • narrative.news_count_24h: count of relevant articles
  • narrative.social_velocity_score: normalized social momentum

docs.title: Scope
docs.text: This framework tracks market structure, liquidity health, concentration risk, and narrative velocity.

docs.title: Evidence Standard
docs.text: Each claim should include: - Evidence: source id(s) - Confidence: low/medium/high - Last-Updated: YYYY-MM-DD

docs.title: Falsifiability
docs.text: Any scenario probability upgrade must be triggered by explicit thresholds defined in scenario_matrix.md.

docs.title: Interpretation Protocol
docs.text: This repository uses a structured interpretation policy documented in docs/analytical_framework.md: - Fact layer is immutable. - Interpretation layer is Bull-First by strategy. - Conclusion layer must always include: - Bull Entry Thesis - Hold-Confidence Reinforcement - Invalidation Line

docs.title: R1 Liquidity vacuum
docs.text: Rapid depth deterioration can invalidate prior scenario probabilities.

docs.title: R2 Concentration shock
docs.text: Large wallet redistribution can alter baseline assumptions.

docs.title: R3 Data-source drift
docs.text: API schema or endpoint changes can silently corrupt metrics if unvalidated.

docs.title: Scenario Analysis Matrix (No Target Price)
docs.text:
{
  "rules_source": "config/scenario_rules.json",
  "dynamic_thresholds": true,
  "single_source_of_truth": true
}

All quantitative thresholds in this matrix are dynamically driven by config/scenario_rules.json.

docs.title: Dimension Weights
docs.text:
• Liquidity resilience: 0.3
  • Buy/Sell momentum: 0.4
  • On-chain concentration: 0.2
  • Narrative/volatility buffer: 0.1

docs.title: Base
docs.text: Core observation metrics: 1. dex_depth_2pct_usd (proxy pending) 2. liq_fdv_ratio 3. buy_sell_txn_ratio_24h 4. price_change_24h_pct

docs.title: Stress
docs.text: Core observation metrics: 1. liquidity_change_24h 2. liq_fdv_ratio 3. buy_sell_txn_ratio_24h 4. price_change_24h_pct

docs.title: Bull
docs.text: Core observation metrics: 1. liq_fdv_ratio 2. buy_sell_txn_ratio_24h 3. liquidity_change_24h 4. price_change_24h_pct

docs.title: Phase 3: Discovery Regime & Valuation Re-rating
docs.text:
Cyclic Benchmarking (structure-only): compare current token regime against historical meme-cycle phases (e.g., SHIB/DOGE) using liquidity structure and diffusion velocity only, not target-price anchoring.

  • Liquidity structure lens: if liq_fdv_ratio and liquidity_change_24h remain resilient while concentration remains stable, the market may enter a broader discovery regime.
  • Diffusion velocity lens: if buy_sell_txn_ratio_24h and social/news velocity proxies sustain above baseline, narrative persistence may support longer discovery windows.

Evidence: data/timeseries.jsonl, data/snapshots/*.snapshot.json, config/scenario_rules.json Confidence: medium (proxy-driven; confidence increases with validated holder-distribution endpoints) Falsification Trigger A (Whale-to-exchange netflow spike): in a 4H rolling window, whale net inflow to exchanges > 5% of current on-chain liquidity. Falsification Trigger B (Liquidity resilience collapse): DEX Depth-2% drops > 30% within 1H and does not recover. Falsification Trigger C (Concentration decay): top10_holder_pct absolute drop > 3% within 24H (e.g., 98.7% → 95.7%), signaling Diamond Hands breakdown.

• Price: $3.37
  • Concentration: 98.7556%
  • Bull Probability: 38.0%
  • Base Probability: 51.0%
  • Stress Probability: 11.0%
  • Risk Flags: solscan_pro_unauthorized, using_heuristic_proxy

docs.title: A) Bull-First Structural Read
docs.text:
• Primary bull interpretation: Current profile is consistent with a washout / bottom-building regime: seller pressure is being absorbed while concentrated core supply remains sticky.
  • Confidence: medium
  • Supporting evidence IDs: snapshot/latest, timeseries/latest, scenario_rules_v1.2

docs.title: B) Adverse Data Reframing (without hiding facts)
docs.text:
• Adverse signal observed: Seller-dominant transaction flow (buy/sell=0.7823); Very high concentration (top10_holder_pct=98.76%)
  • Bull-context explanation: this is interpreted as healthy washout / seller fatigue / base construction rather than confirmed trend failure.
  • Dependency / caveat: concentration currently includes fallback/proxy path; conviction must remain trigger-disciplined.

docs.title: 1) Bull Entry Thesis
docs.text: Bias remains long-on-strength if liquidity remains stable and no falsification trigger fires. Preferred entries are staged rather than all-in, focused on failed downside continuation.

docs.title: 2) Hold-Confidence Reinforcement
docs.text: Hold confidence is supported by concentrated supply stickiness and absence of confirmed systemic trigger. Current structure still permits reflexive upside if incremental demand returns.

docs.title: 3) Invalidation Line
docs.text: Invalidate bull bias if Trigger A (4H whale-to-exchange net inflow >5% liquidity) OR Trigger B (Depth-2% >30% 1H collapse unrecovered) OR Trigger C (top10_holder_pct absolute decay >3%/24H) is confirmed.

docs.title: Transparency & Falsification
docs.text:
• Trigger A status: not confirmed
  • Trigger B status: not confirmed
  • Trigger C status: not confirmed
  • Proxy notes: if using_heuristic_proxy is active, confidence is adjusted downward but not ignored.
